rationale: The cited paper is a strong topical and methodological antecedent: it models how banner ad exposure affects actual Internet purchasing using a duration-dependent survival framework and targeting implications, while the citing paper evaluates retargeted display ads on purchase outcomes and also uses hazard-style modeling. Given this close overlap in domain (online display advertising to purchase) and empirical approach, this is plausibly a substantive prior-work anchor rather than an incidental mention.
